description: Topping every teen's wardrobe wish-list, this striking pair of sandals is the right choice for the summer with its sunset hues and stylish straps looping elegantly around your foot. enroute's Spring Summer collection includes this endlessly versatile piece - a definite eye candy, which looks enviously good with ethnic and casual western wear!UpperDyed leather upper with forefoot and midfoot strapsLightly padded footbed with a brand patch at the heelOutsoleTPU textured outsole with an upraised heelSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
